text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa is looking pretty tired, so we
decide that she should rest in the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Claro! I'll rest up and get ready for more training!

text_block_list.name: Wrestling Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Welcome to the fateful title match for the belt of
the world's strongest!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Qué?! What?! How'd I get in a wrestling arena?!

text_block_list.name: Wrestling Commentator
text_block_list.text: In the blue corner is El Condooor Pasaaa!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I dunno what's goin' on, but they called my name,
so I should get out there!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Soaring onto the world stage—it's the crimson
Phantom Bird!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: El Condor Pasa has arriiiiived!

text_block_list.name: Wrestling Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Both our competitors are here! Can the challenger
take down the champion?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: No matter the opponent, I'm giving no quarter!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
After all, the title of world's strongest is waiting
for me!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I won! I'm the world's strongest!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Qué?! What's goin' on?! Where's my belt?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Was it... a dream?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ah well, doesn't change that I'm still the world's
strongest racer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a short break, El Condor Pasa is back to her
normal self.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
What?! What do you mean it's against the rules to
have wings?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hey! Where'd the champion go?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Was it all just a dream?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
But... dang it. Lettin' the champion get away like
that...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ugh, this sucks!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa has been feeling a bit down since
then...
